feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Graph
feed.subtitle: SAP Graph Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: RAP: Creating a child entity with 'create by associat...
entry.content: Hi Patrick, Although Inline creation mode worked well, client seems to be not happy with it. So still exploring. I am trying to follow this approach but facing the same issue as here. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/can-we-fill-child-entity-in-rap-app-before-create-the-new-object/qaq-p/13604341 Child entity is getting created when I click on save but the child entry is not showing up on the UI even with side effects initially when you come to the object page. Any thoughts? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: DMC Tile Authorization
entry.content: Hi , you can edit your own personal launchpad as Manoel has described but it is not currently possible to edit another users launchpad. It is on the roadmap to have a more granular authorization and also support SAP Workzone which would give you what you are looking for but at the moment it looking like 2025 (subject to change) for that functionality to appear in the core product. You could also add this onto the customer influence page and the more people that vote for it the higher priority it would be given. Thanks Kevin

entry.title: Re: Warning message : Duplicate check not possible; requi...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please review the configurations in MDGIMG->General Settings->Data Quality and Search->Search and Duplicate Check->Define Search Application.

Here choose the corresponding search mode that is used for determining the duplicate check (mostly HANA so HA ) and click on the Match Profile. 

Choose the Match Profile you are using to determine the duplicate check and click on relevant fields.

Here make sure the fields that are marked mandatory are filled on MDG UI and in case if you do not want a particular field to be mandatory for determining duplicate check then uncheck the mandatory checkbox for that field.

More information on the setting/configurations of duplicate check can be found here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/6d52de87aa0d4fb6a90924720a5b0549/4d523f354bf74b049cfd5f59aa56aac4.html?locale=en-US

Regards,

Khadeer

entry.title: Re: JSON to XML Converter in SAP Cloud Integration raises error "Invalid white space character&&
entry.content:
Hi @inturidevendra,

Can you post the payload you are trying to send to the converter as a "code sample"  container here (there is an icon under the additional tools accessible via the '...' button on the toolbar.

Also, could you also share a screenshot of the iFlow where the issue is happening?

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: Sap Fiori Element Composition of one issues when using 3 levels hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi CAP/Fiori Elements experts.

I am working on one application that is using several levels of hierarchy. please see the schema below:

entity groups:cuid{  
  groupID : String;
  description: String;
  versions : Composition of many GroupVersion on versions.groupID = $self ;
}

entity GroupVersion:cuid{
  groupID : Association to groups;   
  limitsGroupVersion: Composition of one LimitsGroupVersion on limitsGroupVersion.groupVersionID = $self;
}

entity LimitsGroupVersion:cuid{  
  groupVersionID : Association to GroupVersion;
  value1: Integer;
  value2: Integer;
  dimensionLimit: Composition of many MachineDimensionLimits on dimensionLimit.limitGroupVersion = $self;
}

entity MachineDimensionLimits{
  limitGroupVersion: Association to  LimitsGroupVersion;
  limitType: Association to LimitTypes;
  min: Integer;
  max: Integer;
  unit: String(3);
}

 

When trying to create a fiori element list report application in the group version object page I can add the data from the composition entity limitsGroupVersion(groupVersionID,value1,value2) but I cannot add the data related to the dimensionLimit (that is a composition to many relation). It seems I cannot added because it does not directly belong to the GroupVersion Entity and fiori does not recognize it from the composition to one definition.

 the example application can be found here

what could be done in Fiori Elements to be able to maintain this grand-grandchild entities when using several hierarchy levels and composition to one?

Thanks,

Tatiana F

entry.title: Re: DMC Tile Authorization
Re: 417 An authorization problem occurred when downloading the configuration
entry.content: It works for me

entry.title: Message AA616 In AW01N
entry.content:
Hi every body,

We are migrating from version 15 to version 2023 S4/HANA.
I executed the AFAR transaction, in which it indicated that I had assets with incorrect processing, when I view the asset in the AW01N I have the following error:

Acquisition value positive in area 02.

Message No. AA616

 

The configuration that I had in area 02 is the next:

entry.title: VIM open text work flow
entry.content:
Hi All, We are updating the payment method in work flow for electronic and paper Invoices. But it is not reflecting in Invoice document or in FI document. This is happening only for electronic Invoices but not for paper Invoices. 

Kindly please help me on this.

entry.title: S4H with ePP/DS - purchase requisitions are created with nr 000000 in ePP/DS - why?
entry.content:
Hi,

purchase requisitions are created with nr 000000 in ePP/DS and get the real nr first when they arrive in S4H.

what has to be done to have purchase requisitions created by mrp live with real nr? there is one number range created in ePP/DS.

 

best regards,

Walter

entry.title: Re: I need to add a new field in CO11n
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use enhancement CONFPP07, by adding Freely definable area (“Freely definable detail screen 1”) to your confirmation profile (OPK0)

Please check the below thread for more details.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/confirmation-of-user-defined-fields-on-co11n/qaq-p/2342715

 (Best practice is to copy the standard and create a custom confirmation profile and do the changes, then make it the default or assign to relevant users who needs to the see the custom field  via user parameter ‘CORUPROF’ )

entry.title: Re: Unable to run a query with secondary database in capm
entry.content:
Perhaps you can try exactly as described in documentation:

 

const db1 = cds.connect.to('db')
const db2 = cds.connect.to('secondary-database')

this.on ('getRecords', async(req) => {
  await db1.run('query 1'),
  await db2.run('query 2'),
})

 

The issue you have is not with transactions, but with the service to which the query is dispatched.  Leave the transaction handling to the framework. 

Note 1: It does not matter whether cds.connect.to("a_service") is in the event handler or outside so long as cds is initialized before this call. Connected services are all cached in cds.services. 

Note 2: But transactions should not normally be created outside of the request processing. Transaction captures the context from the request. If you follow this guidance, you don't have to manually manage the transactions. This is neatly explained in this must watch presentation.

entry.title: Re: Fabrication data about batch info
entry.content:
Hi

You can check with the functional module 'VB_BATCH_GET_DETAIL' and go for a custom report.

entry.title: How to make a field in SAP Sales order Va02 as a non editable field
entry.content:
Hello 

 

I am looking for help .. 

 

How Can I make a field example -  Customer group of ' Va02 Manage Sales order App ' screen of SAP Fiori as a non-editable field .

Please help is there any Standard solution available?

Thanks

SAP Fiori learner.

entry.title: Re: Missing Automated Defect Recording Pop Up for QM-Qual...
entry.content: Thanks, Prasath, we have verified that the indicator is set. It is only happening on a limited number of MICs and only during manufacturing inspection. We're not sure why this is happening, but we can replicate it. I may request someone in technical run a trace on this to see where it's breaking down.

entry.title: S4H - the transfer of simulation version into the active one creates no secondary requirements
entry.content:
Hi,

once we are done with the simulation version, we transfer the results into the active one. There we see that now and then the quantities are not copied 1:1 or in general no secondary requirements are generated for the components.

what can be the reason?

have a good day!

Walter

entry.title: How to get the table name which will store the genereated program executed through GR55 .
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have executed a Transaction GR55 with a report group 6OBU. It has generated a program GP4JH6****3600.

Now, I would like to where this generated program will get stored in the system for the same report group 60BU, for the same version as per the standard transaction S_ALR_87013019.

If I execute the S_ALR_87013019, in the technical information I am getting the report group,version and other generated program such as Execute, Select,Multiple Selection and Output.

I would like to know the generated program against the Output Program.

How to retrieve it ( from any FM or any Table name etc..)

entry.title: Re: IPS Requirement to Activate People Analytics
entry.content: thank you dyaryura! very interesting documentation.

entry.title: Re: How to Post a Json Body to an Odata Url in CPI
entry.content:
This blog explains it in detail.

Posting Sales Orders into S/4HANA Cloud API - Part... - SAP Community

entry.title: What's new viewer API availability
entry.content:
Hello Community & Partners!

we would like to streamline availability of SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite  Release details towards our organization and store the same on our client Knowledge base repository.

are there available API which allows to get the release information from what's new viewer?
